purpose: Operator-gated half of QA: promotes a QA report (already posted on an issue by qa-engineer) into a goal — manifest entry + one fix-ticket per finding + a committed <statePath>/goals/instances/<id>/state.json in the configured state repo. Deterministic, no agent. The qa / qa-sweep capabilities surface a `@kody qa-goal --issue <n>` inbox rec; this runs when the operator approves it, so QA never auto-creates goals on its own.

issue.description: Issue number carrying qa-engineer's QA report (the comment with the <!-- KODY_QA_REPORT_JSON --> block).

scope.description: Optional scope label for the goal name (e.g. the changelog entry title). Defaults to 'smoke'.

goal.description: Optional existing goal id to attach findings to instead of creating a new one.

permissions.name: gh
permissions.usage: Reads the QA report (`gh issue view --json comments`), appends to the goals manifest, and opens fix-ticket issues.

success: qa-goal completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: qa-goal cannot return a valid canonical result
